untranslatable_reason: Pete's Candle pattern requires dynamic price target calculation based on candle height, shadow ratios, and median comparison. The exit targets (43.76 / 41.80) are example-specific values dependent on runtime candle analysis. No single allowed indicator captures: (1) live candle height measurement, (2) shadow-to-price ratio computation, (3) median shadow ratio comparison, or (4) dynamic multiplier selection (6 vs 3). The pattern logic requires custom candlestick geometry analysis beyond standard OHLCV indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted to encode directional breakout logic using high/low crosses and wick characteristics, but the core price target formula—(candle_height / divisor × percentage) + reference_price—cannot be expressed with allowed indicators. This pattern requires a custom indicator or dedicated pattern recognition module in the backtest engine.
